title: The War at Marineford Begins: Key Exchange
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #18 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Whitebeard, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #17, focusing on the immediate stakes of the war at marineford begins: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gugara ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pachi...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gufooo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Has it been 100 times now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I think it has.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do all of you call him

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Our "old Man," anyway...?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Because... He calls us his sons.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It makes us happy...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Even if it's just a word...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Or you stay, and bear whitebeard's mark....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Ha- Haaaah !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Ace has gone and done it again----!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: He made the Doma gang Sur- Render!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: me, command the second division...?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: You go for it, Commander Ace!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I heard this guy's crazy strong!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Gurarara... I see... that is a surprise...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: I see... yes...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: He was your enemy, wasn't he?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Aren't you going to throw me out?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Gurara- Rara!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Don't Do It !!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ACE!!! calm down, would you!!?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: You don't have to go after teach!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: ACE... that's enough. Just this once...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: When my father's name is at stake!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I am going to settle this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wait!!! Come back, ace!!!

summary: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Whitebeard, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #17, focusing on the immediate stakes of the war at marineford begins: key exchange.
